summary: Completed comprehensive testing of One Piece RPG application. Backend APIs mostly functional with critical battle system bug. Frontend UI working well but character creation has authentication token issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectID serialization problem
critical_bugs.impact: Battle system completely non-functional - core feature failure
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]

timeout_issues.issue: Avatar generation times out after 10 seconds
timeout_issues.symptoms: LLM image generation takes longer than test timeout
timeout_issues.workaround: Increase timeout or handle async generation

integration_issues.issue: 401 Unauthorized error when creating character after completing wizard
integration_issues.details: Character creation wizard works perfectly (all 4 steps), but final API call fails with auth error

passed_tests: Landing page loads with 3 buttons (Inizia Avventura, Accedi, Google)
Register page form fields and submission
Login page form fields and navigation
Character creation wizard UI (all 4 steps functional)
Backend: World map and islands API
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical battle system ObjectID serialization bug in /api/battle/start endpoint. Fix character creation authentication token handling in frontend. The MongoDB ObjectID serialization issue prevents battle system from working - should use UUIDs instead of ObjectIDs as mentioned in guidelines.
